experiments.description: 在收到人类关于 pick-and-place 行为生硬的反馈后，将 AT_GOAL_BONUS 从 20 降至 5，同时保持 N_UPDATES=4。
experiments.hypothesis: 将 at-goal bonus 从 20 降至 5 应能保留足够的最终放置激励，同时避免 exp10 中观察到的生硬、纯推动行为；如果假设成立，success_rate 应保持在 0.20 附近，且画面应呈现更平滑的物体搬运过程。
changes_made: 保留当前分支中较高的 replay ratio N_UPDATES=4。
按 exp12 提交所示，将 AT_GOAL_BONUS 降至 5.0。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: 夹爪能接近方块但很少推动它；可能只有初始位姿就靠近目标的简单情形才会成功
vlm_failure_modes: 靠近物体但无法稳定闭合或抓取
除非初始几何条件本身较易，否则物体几乎没有位移
降低 AT_GOAL_BONUS 后，最终放置激励显得过弱
N_UPDATES=4 牺牲了环境多样性，但并未带来 success 提升
vlm_suggestions: 将 AT_GOAL_BONUS 恢复为 20
回到 exp10 中已验证的 N_UPDATES=3 设置
若要解决动作生硬问题，应增加平滑的局部最终放置奖励，而非降低硬性的成功 bonus
experiments.lesson_learned: 降低 at-goal bonus 使 success_rate 从原有 0.20 的最佳值回退至 0.10，行为表现更像接近/悬停而非稳健搬运；+20 的放置激励对该指标起到关键支撑作用。

experiments.description: 保留 exp10 的 N_UPDATES=3 和 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 这一锚点，但在距目标 10 cm 范围内对方块速度 shaping bonus 进行衰减。
experiments.hypothesis: exp10 的 +20 at-goal bonus 起到关键支撑作用；动作生硬可能源于速度 bonus 在目标附近仍持续奖励方块运动。在 10 cm 内缩放速度 bonus 应能在保持 success 的同时减少近目标处的过冲。
changes_made: 新增 VEL_DAMP_GOAL_RADIUS=0.10。
在 HER replay 奖励重计算和在线奖励记录中，将 vel_bonus 按 min(d_block_goal / VEL_DAMP_GOAL_RADIUS, 1.0) 缩放。
保持 N_UPDATES=3 和 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20.0 与 exp10 一致。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: 夹爪接近或悬停在方块附近，但方块保持静止，所有采样 rollout 均未成功
vlm_failure_modes: 仅有接近，没有可靠的抓取或推动
所有采样 rollout 中物体都保持静止
机械臂在到达桌面后有时会移开
在稳定操作行为出现之前，近目标速度衰减就削弱了有用的搬运 shaping
vlm_suggestions: 恢复完整的速度 bonus
保持 exp10 的 N_UPDATES=3 与 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 锚点
尝试接触获取相关的 shaping，例如仅在夹爪靠近方块时才奖励夹爪闭合
experiments.lesson_learned: 对当前这一脆弱的 policy 而言，速度 bonus 仍然有用；在 10 cm 内对其进行衰减使 success 回退至 0.0，并且画面中再无可见的物体运动。

experiments.description: 保留 exp10 的搬运奖励，并新增一个仅在距方块 6 cm 内生效的小幅闭合指令 bonus。
experiments.hypothesis: 视觉反馈显示存在接近/悬停但无接触的现象。仅在方块附近奖励负向夹爪动作应能提升抓取/推动接触，而不会奖励远处的闭合动作，使 success 至少恢复到 0.20 的最佳值。
changes_made: 新增 CONTACT_GRIP_RADIUS=0.06 和 CONTACT_CLOSE_BONUS=1.0。
在在线奖励中加入 close_bonus = CONTACT_CLOSE_BONUS * near_contact * max(-action[3], 0)。
将采样的 action 传入 HER 奖励重计算中，使重标记的奖励包含同样的闭合指令 shaping。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: 夹爪在方块附近会改变姿态，但接触较弱或方向偏差，方块未被搬运
vlm_failure_modes: 接触较弱，无法将方块送至目标
夹爪在接近后可能沿桌沿向下运动
方块保持静止或仅有极小位移
依赖动作的闭合 shaping 增加了局部行为，但并未解决搬运问题
vlm_suggestions: 移除接触闭合 bonus
恢复 exp10 的奖励 shaping
单独验证 N_UPDATES=4 与 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 的组合，因为 exp12 把 replay ratio 与减弱的终局 bonus 混在了一起
experiments.lesson_learned: 靠近方块时的小幅闭合指令 bonus 并未改善稀疏 success；瓶颈在于接近/接触之后的目标导向搬运，而非仅仅是发出闭合动作。

experiments.description: 在保留 exp10 的 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 与搬运奖励 shaping 的同时，单独验证 N_UPDATES=4 的效果。
experiments.hypothesis: exp12 的失败混淆了 RR=4 与将 AT_GOAL_BONUS 降至 5 这两个变化。保持 exp10 的奖励锚点、仅提高 replay ratio，可能在不削弱最终放置激励的前提下改善价值拟合。
changes_made: 将 N_UPDATES 从 3 改为 4。
保持 SHAPING_GRIP_COEF、SHAPING_GOAL_COEF、SHAPING_VEL_COEF、MAX_VEL_BONUS 和 AT_GOAL_BONUS 与 exp10 一致。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: RR=4 恢复了一次 success，但采样画面中目标导向的方块搬运仍然较弱或缺失
vlm_failure_modes: 夹爪到达桌面物体一侧但缺乏有效位移
采样 rollout 中方块仍远离目标
训练早期 critic 与 actor 量级出现尖峰，提示 over-updating
在固定时间预算下环境 episode 数减少，可能降低了探索
vlm_suggestions: 恢复 N_UPDATES=3
保留 exp10 的终局奖励与速度奖励
为减小 block-goal 距离增加带上限的奖励，使方块运动更具目标导向性而非任意方向
experiments.lesson_learned: AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 下的 RR=4 优于混淆变量的 exp12，但仍低于 RR=3 的最佳值；在固定 wall-clock 预算下，更多的环境多样性比第四次更新更划算。

experiments.description: 在保留 exp10 奖励的同时，为相邻两步之间 block-goal 距离的减小新增了带上限的 bonus。
experiments.hypothesis: 当前的速度 shaping 会奖励任意方向的方块运动，而视觉 rollout 显示搬运较弱或方向偏差。对 block-goal 距离的下降给予带上限的 +5 bonus，应能让推动更具目标导向性。
changes_made: 新增 GOAL_PROGRESS_COEF=100.0 和 MAX_GOAL_PROGRESS_BONUS=5.0。
将正向进度计算为 max(上一步 block-goal 距离 - 当前 block-goal 距离, 0)。
将带上限的进度 bonus 同时纳入在线奖励和 HER 奖励重计算。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: 平均距离有所改善，但 rollout 显示接近未中，方块停留在 success 阈值之外
vlm_failure_modes: 近目标状态仍位于 0.05 的 success 阈值之外
夹爪在接近后常常又移开
物体运动仍不一致
训练后期 critic loss 出现尖峰，提示价值目标更嘈杂
vlm_suggestions: 移除 goal-progress bonus
恢复 exp10 的奖励 shaping
在保留 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 的前提下，尝试在目标周围使用更平滑的局部最终放置奖励
experiments.lesson_learned: Goal-progress shaping 改善了最终距离但未带来稀疏 success；这个任务需要更强的局部最终放置压力，而不仅仅是时序进度 bonus。

experiments.description: 在保留 AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 的同时，围绕 block-goal 目标点新增一个平滑的高斯局部 bonus。
experiments.hypothesis: exp16 改善了平均距离，但接近未中的状态仍位于 0.05 的 success 阈值之外。围绕目标的平滑高斯 bonus 应能提供局部放置压力，同时由硬性的 at-goal bonus 继续承担 success 激励。
changes_made: 新增 LOCAL_GOAL_BONUS=10.0 和 LOCAL_GOAL_SIGMA=0.10。
在在线奖励和 HER 重计算奖励中加入 LOCAL_GOAL_BONUS * exp(-(d_block_goal / LOCAL_GOAL_SIGMA)^2)。
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: 机械臂回缩或抬离，方块保持静止；近目标处的平滑 bonus 造成不稳定，且未改善接触
vlm_failure_modes: 机械臂从物体处回缩或抬离
采样 rollout 中方块保持静止
平均距离明显恶化
训练大部分时间内 critic loss 维持在较高水平
vlm_suggestions: 移除高斯局部目标 bonus
恢复 exp10 的奖励 shaping
若要加强最终放置压力，应调整已有的硬性 at-goal bonus，而不是新增宽广的稠密正向奖励
experiments.lesson_learned: 在当前 shaped 奖励量级下，宽广的 +10 高斯近目标 bonus 过大；它推高了价值目标，并使行为退化为机械臂回缩、物体不动。

experiments.description: External sparse-reward early-stop setup: N_UPDATES=1, 7200s ceiling, 5-episode spot evals, and no dense shaping.
experiments.hypothesis: The new early-stop instrumentation may allow a sparse baseline to run longer only when useful, while stopping no-progress runs before the 2-hour ceiling.
changes_made: Used code commit 65db451, which changed TIME_BUDGET to a 7200s ceiling.
Used sparse reward recomputation and N_UPDATES=1.
Used spot eval early stopping; run stopped after last three spot evals were all zero.
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: ties best scalar success at 0.20, but rendered rollouts still show weak or absent block transport
vlm_failure_modes: successes are not visible in the three rendered rollouts
gripper often moves away after approach
block displacement remains weak and inconsistent
spot evals were unstable: 0.00, 0.00, 0.20, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00
vlm_suggestions: keep the early-stop infrastructure as promising
do not replace the existing best commit because success only tied 0.20
test exp10 shaping on top of the early-stop/long-ceiling infrastructure
experiments.lesson_learned: Sparse training with long-ceiling early stop can tie the best success rate and improve mean reward, but visual behavior is not yet robust; the infrastructure is promising but not a new best by success rate.

experiments.description: Combined the sparse early-stop infrastructure from 65db451 with the exp10 dense shaping recipe, LayerNorm critic, Q_MIN clamp, and N_UPDATES=3.
experiments.hypothesis: Sparse early-stop tied the best scalar success, while exp10 remains the strongest known dense shaping recipe. Restoring exp10 shaping on top of the longer early-stop runner should improve spot-eval stability and exceed 0.20 success.
changes_made: Set N_UPDATES from 1 back to 3.
Restored exp10 grip-distance, block-goal-distance, block-velocity, and at-goal training rewards.
Restored LayerNorm in both critic networks.
Restored Q_MIN=-200 target clamp and removed entropy from the critic bootstrap target.
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: the policy regressed to zero final success; sampled rollouts show hovering, retreating, and no useful block transport
vlm_failure_modes: spot evals were unstable then collapsed: 0.20, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00
critic loss climbed into the 300-400 range during early training
episode 0 moved the gripper away from the table after start while the block stayed put
episode 1 hovered near the block without moving it to the goal
episode 2 retreated behind the table and left the block stationary
vlm_suggestions: discard the full exp10 restore on the early-stop runner
restore the sparse early-stop baseline from 65db451
if continuing, test smaller isolated changes such as N_UPDATES=2 or one shaping component at a time
experiments.lesson_learned: The complete exp10 recipe does not transfer cleanly onto the early-stop sparse runner. Replay ratio 3 plus dense shaping and critic target changes caused early noisy value learning and no-progress early stop, so future tests should isolate one factor at a time.

experiments.description: Isolated replay-ratio test on the sparse early-stop baseline: changed only N_UPDATES from 1 to 2.
experiments.hypothesis: Exp18 showed sparse N_UPDATES=1 with early-stop can tie the 0.20 best, while exp19 failed because too many factors changed at once. Increasing only N_UPDATES to 2 should improve sample reuse without reintroducing dense shaping instability.
changes_made: Set N_UPDATES=2 in train.py.
Kept sparse reward recomputation, no dense shaping, no LayerNorm critic, and the existing early-stop infrastructure unchanged.
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: N_UPDATES=2 regressed sparse success to zero; sampled rollouts show approach or retreat with no useful object transport
vlm_failure_modes: all spot evals were zero: 0.00, 0.00, 0.00
critic loss rose from below 1 to around 18.8 by 50k steps
episode 0 hovered on the robot side of the table while the block stayed off target
episode 1 started with the block near the goal but the arm moved away and failed to finish placement
episode 2 approached beside the block but did not push it to the goal
vlm_suggestions: restore N_UPDATES=1 sparse early-stop baseline
avoid increasing sparse replay ratio without another stabilizer
next isolate a very small contact or action prior rather than increasing update count
experiments.lesson_learned: Increasing sparse replay ratio from 1 to 2 reduced wall-clock exploration and increased critic error without producing any successful spot evals. The early-stop sparse baseline appears sensitive to extra updates.

experiments.description: Added a small MIN_ALPHA=0.02 entropy floor to the sparse N_UPDATES=1 early-stop baseline.
experiments.hypothesis: Exp18 tied the best while spot evals were unstable and entropy could collapse. Keeping alpha at least 0.02 should preserve exploration/contact attempts longer without changing replay ratio or reward shaping, improving spot-eval stability over exp18.
changes_made: Added MIN_ALPHA=0.02.
Clamped the automatically tuned SAC entropy coefficient to max(exp(log_alpha), MIN_ALPHA).
Kept sparse reward recomputation, HER_K=4, N_UPDATES=1, and the early-stop infrastructure unchanged.
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: entropy floor produced one mid-run 0.20 spot eval but final success was 0.0; rendered rollouts show approach/hover behavior with no useful block transport
vlm_failure_modes: final eval success was 0.0 despite spot-eval history 0.00, 0.00, 0.20, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00
gripper approaches the block or hovers beside/above it but does not push it to the goal
block remains stationary or nearly stationary in all three rendered rollouts
extra entropy preserves some exploration but does not turn contact attempts into stable goal-directed transport
vlm_suggestions: discard the entropy-floor change and restore the sparse N_UPDATES=1 baseline
avoid pure exploration/entropy tweaks as the next main direction unless paired with a transport-specific signal
try a small action-prior or goal-directed push bias only when the gripper is already near the block
experiments.lesson_learned: A small SAC entropy floor can keep the sparse early-stop run alive long enough to hit a 0.20 spot eval, but it did not improve final evaluation or rendered behavior; the bottleneck is not just premature entropy collapse, but converting near-contact into goal-directed object transport.

experiments.description: Added a gated transport action prior that nudges actions toward the block-to-goal direction only when the gripper is within 9 cm of the block.
experiments.hypothesis: Recent sparse early-stop runs repeatedly reach or hover near the block but fail to move it to the goal. A small post-policy action prior, active only when the gripper is within 9 cm of the block, should convert near-contact states into goal-directed pushes by nudging XY motion from block toward goal while lightly maintaining table contact, without changing replay ratio or reward shaping.
changes_made: Added USE_TRANSPORT_ACTION_PRIOR with PRIOR_CONTACT_RADIUS=0.09, PRIOR_PUSH_COEF=0.20, PRIOR_DOWN_COEF=0.10, and PRIOR_MAX_DELTA=0.25.
Applied the prior to training actions after random/policy action selection so replay stores the executed biased action.
Applied the same prior in spot evaluation and final evaluation/render policy functions.
Kept sparse reward recomputation, HER_K=4, N_UPDATES=1, and automatic entropy unchanged.
experiments.vlm_feedback_summary: gated push prior produced intermittent 0.20 spot evals and better mean distance, but final success stayed 0.0; renders show near-contact/parking without completing block transport
vlm_failure_modes: spot evals alternated 0.00 and 0.20 before ending with three zeros
final rendered rollouts show the gripper beside or over the block but not pushing through to the goal
block often remains just offset from the red marker rather than crossing the success threshold
the prior may improve contact geometry but is too weak or poorly timed to create stable final placement
vlm_suggestions: discard this exact action-prior change and restore the sparse N_UPDATES=1 baseline
if revisiting action priors, test a stronger or longer-horizon push primitive rather than a small additive nudge
consider a short hand-coded near-contact controller only for deterministic evaluation if the experiment goal allows policy post-processing, but treat it as a separate structural direction
experiments.lesson_learned: A small gated transport action prior can produce intermittent 0.20 spot evals and improve final mean distance to 0.258, but it still failed final sparse success. The contact-to-transport bottleneck needs either a stronger persistent push mechanism or a learning signal that makes the block cross the final threshold, not just a low-gain local nudge.

insights: Existing results.tsv shows the best run is exp10 commit 6b5cfd7 with success_rate 0.20 using N_UPDATES=3.
AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 appears load-bearing for sparse eval success; reducing it to 5 lowered success_rate to 0.10.
The block velocity bonus also appears load-bearing; damping it near the goal lowered success_rate to 0.0 and removed visible transport behavior.
Near-block close-command shaping did not improve success; contact acquisition alone is insufficient without better goal-directed transport.
N_UPDATES=4 with AT_GOAL_BONUS=20 recovers 0.10 success but remains below N_UPDATES=3, suggesting RR=3 is the better wall-clock tradeoff.
Goal-progress shaping improved mean distance to 0.255 but yielded 0.0 success, indicating near-miss behavior without final placement.
A broad +10 Gaussian local-goal bonus destabilized value learning and worsened mean distance to 0.376.
Sparse N_UPDATES=1 with long-ceiling early-stop instrumentation tied the 0.20 best success rate, but visual rollouts still lacked robust transport.
Fully restoring exp10 shaping, LayerNorm critic, Q_MIN clamp, and N_UPDATES=3 on top of early-stop instrumentation regressed to 0.0 success.
Sparse N_UPDATES=2 also regressed to 0.0 success, suggesting the N_UPDATES=1 early-stop setup is the better current infrastructure anchor.
A MIN_ALPHA=0.02 entropy floor on the sparse N_UPDATES=1 early-stop baseline produced one 0.20 spot eval but final success still regressed to 0.0, so entropy preservation alone is insufficient.

The gated near-contact push prior improved final mean distance versus exp21 (0.258 vs 0.279) and produced two 0.20 spot evals, but final success stayed 0.0; low-gain action nudges are not enough for stable placement.
failed_directions: AT_GOAL_BONUS 20 -> 5 while using N_UPDATES=4: regressed success_rate to 0.10 and produced approach/hover behavior rather than reliable transport.
Velocity bonus damping inside 10 cm of the goal: regressed success_rate to 0.0 and produced stationary-object rollouts.
Close-command bonus gated within 6 cm of the block: regressed success_rate to 0.0 and caused weak or misdirected contact without transport.
N_UPDATES 3 -> 4 with AT_GOAL_BONUS=20: recovered only 0.10 success and showed early loss spikes plus weak transport.
Capped block-goal progress bonus: improved mean distance but regressed success to 0.0 and produced near-misses.
Broad Gaussian local-goal bonus: regressed success to 0.0, worsened mean distance to 0.376, and caused arm retraction.
Full exp10 recipe on early-stop sparse infrastructure: regressed success to 0.0 and hit no-progress early stop after spot evals 0.20, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00.
Sparse N_UPDATES 1 -> 2 on early-stop infrastructure: regressed success to 0.0, produced all-zero spot evals, and raised critic loss late in the run.
MIN_ALPHA=0.02 entropy floor on sparse N_UPDATES=1 early-stop baseline: produced a mid-run 0.20 spot eval but final success was 0.0 and renders still showed approach/hover without transport.
Low-gain gated transport action prior (9 cm contact radius, +0.20 XY push, +0.10 down): final success remained 0.0 despite intermittent 0.20 spot evals and closer mean distance.
promising_directions: Restore exp10 settings, then address jerkiness with a smoother local final-placement reward instead of lowering the flat at-goal bonus.
Ablate N_UPDATES=4 separately against N_UPDATES=3 only after returning the at-goal bonus to the metric-best value.
Preserve the exp10 transport rewards and add more selective contact-acquisition shaping rather than weakening terminal or velocity transport incentives.
Use the sparse early-stop baseline with N_UPDATES=1 as the current infrastructure anchor and test isolated lightweight shaping or action-prior changes.
If using the sparse early-stop anchor, prefer transport-specific near-contact push/action priors over pure entropy or replay-ratio changes.
If revisiting action priors, test a stronger persistent push primitive or controller-style post-processing rather than a one-step low-gain nudge.
